Bash("../../.venv/Scripts/python" -c "
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, ''.''\)
from flows.flow_country import country_flow
from rbr_prefect import DefaultDeploy

# Create deploy without actually deploying
deploy = DefaultDeploy\(
    flow_func=country_flow,
    name=''country-prefect-test'',
    tags=[''teste''],
\)

print\(''Deploy created successfully!''\)
print\(f''Name: {deploy._name}''\)
print\(f''Tags: {deploy._tags}''\)
print\(f''Image: {deploy._image}''\)
print\(f''Work pool: {deploy._work_pool_name}''\)
print\(f''Entrypoint: {deploy._entrypoint}''\)
print\(f''Parameters \(defaults\): {deploy._parameters}''\)

# Test override
deploy.parameters = deploy.override\(country_name=''Brazil''\)
print\(f''Parameters \(after override\): {deploy.parameters}''\)
")

Bash("../../.venv/Scripts/python" -c "
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, ''.''\)
from flows.flow_country import country_flow
from rbr_prefect import DefaultDeploy

deploy = DefaultDeploy\(
    flow_func=country_flow,
    name=''country-prefect-test'',
    tags=[''teste''],
\)

# Test env resolution
env = deploy._resolve_env\(\)
print\(''Resolved env:''\)
for k, v in env.items\(\):
    print\(f''  {k}: {v}''\)

# Test job_variables resolution
job_vars = deploy._resolve_job_variables\(\)
print\(\)
print\(''Resolved job_variables:''\)
for k, v in job_vars.items\(\):
    if k != ''env'':
        print\(f''  {k}: {v}''\)
    else:
        print\(f''  {k}: <env dict with {len\(v\)} entries>''\)
")

Bash("../../.venv/Scripts/python" -c "
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, ''.''\)
from flows.flow_country import country_flow
from rbr_prefect import DefaultDeploy
from rbr_prefect._cli import print_audit_panel, print_handoff
from rbr_prefect._cli.messages import DeployMessages

deploy = DefaultDeploy\(
    flow_func=country_flow,
    name=''country-prefect-test'',
    tags=[''teste''],
\)
deploy.parameters = deploy.override\(country_name=''Brazil''\)

# Simulate what deploy\(\) does for the audit panel
deploy_name = ''country-prefect-test''

resolved = {
    DeployMessages.LABEL_GITHUB_URL: deploy._source_strategy.resolved_github_url,
    DeployMessages.LABEL_BRANCH: deploy._source_strategy.resolved_branch,
    DeployMessages.LABEL_ENTRYPOINT: deploy._entrypoint,
    DeployMessages.LABEL_NAME: deploy_name,
    DeployMessages.LABEL_IMAGE: deploy._image,
    DeployMessages.LABEL_WORK_POOL: deploy._work_pool_name,
    DeployMessages.LABEL_TAGS: deploy._tags,
}

overrides = {}
if deploy._parameters:
    overrides[DeployMessages.LABEL_PARAMETERS] = deploy._parameters

print_audit_panel\(
    resolved=resolved,
    overrides=overrides,
    env=deploy._resolve_env\(\),
\)

print_handoff\(deploy_name\)

print\(\)
print\(''\(Stopped before actual deploy\)''\)
")
